alkylation reagent: alkylated by the addition of iodoacetamide (15 mM)
alkylation concentration: alkylated by the addition of iodoacetamide (15 mM)
cleavage agent: digested with LC/MS-grade trypsin (1:50 enzyme to protein ratio, w/w)
enrichment method: Phosphopeptides were enriched by using Fe-NTA magnetic beads (CubeBiotech).
fragmentation method: Data was acquired on a data dependent mode with FAIMS running 3 compensation voltages at − 50 v, − 57 v and − 64 v.
instrument: LC–MS analysis was performed using an Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer.
ionization type: separated on a reverse-phase nano-spray column
reduction concentration: reduced by DTT to a final concentration of 5 mM
